name: Compact Context Engine
description: Knowledge-graph-backed context engine with runtime compaction and skill crystallization.

dbPath.label: SQLite Path
dbPath.help: Relative paths resolve under the OpenClaw state dir when available; otherwise from the plugin path/current working directory.

defaultTokenBudget.label: Default Token Budget
defaultTokenBudget.help: Fallback budget when the caller does not provide one.

compileBudgetRatio.label: Compile Budget Ratio
compileBudgetRatio.help: Fraction of the total budget reserved for compiled context output.

enableGatewayMethods.label: Enable Debug Gateway Methods
enableGatewayMethods.help: Registers compact-context.* RPC methods for inspection and debugging.

recentRawMessageCount.label: Recent Raw Messages
recentRawMessageCount.help: How many of the latest non-system messages stay uncompressed in the final prompt.
